title: Count Pairs of Points With Distance k
titleCn: 统计距离为 k 的点对

testcases.input: coordinates = [[1,2],[4,2],[1,3],[5,2]], k = 5 Output: 2 Explanation: We can choose the following pairs: - (0,1): Because we have (1 XOR 4) + (2 XOR 2) = 5. - (2,3): Because we have (1 XOR 5) + (3 XOR 2) = 5.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: We can choose the following pairs: - (0,1): Because we have (1 XOR 4) + (2 XOR 2) = 5. - (2,3): Because we have (1 XOR 5) + (3 XOR 2) = 5.

testcases.input: coordinates = [[1,3],[1,3],[1,3],[1,3],[1,3]], k = 0 Output: 10 Explanation: Any two chosen pairs will have a distance of 0. There are 10 ways to choose two pairs.
testcases.expectedOutput: 10 Explanation: Any two chosen pairs will have a distance of 0. There are 10 ways to choose two pairs.
